daily.today_energy: Your vibe is magnetic rn. The cosmos is basically asking you to lean into your natural charisma and stop playing small. Trust the instinct that's been nudging you lately—it's actually onto something real.
daily.love: Whether you're coupled up or solo, today's about authenticity over performance. Someone (or your future self) is magnetized by the real you, not the highlight reel version. Let your guard down a little.
daily.career: Your creative energy is peaking. This is the day to pitch that idea you've been workshopping or take ownership of a project that matters to you. Your confidence isn't arrogance—it's earned.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement that feels good, not punishment. Dance, walk, stretch—whatever makes you feel alive in your skin. Mental clarity follows when you honor what your physical self actually needs.

weekly.overview: Your energy is magnetic this week, Leo. The cosmos is whispering that it's time to lean into your authentic self without apology. Trust the momentum building around you—something real is shifting beneath the surface.
weekly.love: Venus is playing in your favor, but the real magic happens when you're vulnerable first. Whether single or coupled, let people see the parts of you that usually stay hidden. That's where genuine connection lives.
weekly.career: Your ideas are hitting different right now. This is the week to speak up in that meeting or pitch what you've been sitting on. The universe is backing your confidence, so channel it into something tangible and watch doors open.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for presence this week. Whether it's moving intentionally, resting deeply, or checking in with how you actually feel—honor those signals. Energy shifts when you listen to yourself first.
